title: Safety Testing LLM Agents at Scale: From Risk Discovery to Evidence-Grounded Verification
innovation_summary: Safety Testing LLM Agents at Scale: From Risk Discovery to Evidence-Grounded Verification: To this end, we present Vera, an end-to-end automated safety testing framework that instantiates software engineering testing principles for non-deterministic agents through a three-stage, self-reinforcing pipeline.
